lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! Are you alright?

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: Of courshe! Why why why *hic* why shouldn't I be?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, you look vaguely familiar... haven't I seen you somewhere before?

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: That'sh not likely... I've been here for eh...

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: I've been here for...

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: Yearsh!

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: I've been looking after thish houshe for my... my coushin? Or wash it my brother? A family member anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And where is this... family member of yours?

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: All over, all over... he shaish he went off to wander all over Gielinor. Don't remember why.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm... I wonder, I may have met him...

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: He comesh back sometimesh... saysh he needsh more kebabsh.

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: Or ish that jusht a dream? Sometimesh I dream kebabsh invade Keldi... Keldu... Keldashomething.

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: When you eatsh them, they take over your mind, they do! An army of mindlesh kebab eating dwarvesh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er, yes, well, I think I should be off now.

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: THE KEBABSH WILL COME FOR YOU!*

lines.text: THE KEBABSH WILL COME FOR YOU!

sections.title: When spoken to again without having solved the puzzle box

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: Shorry but you haven't sholved the puzzle yet *hic*.

sections.title: When spoken to again having solved the puzzle box

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: Thanksh [player name]!

lines.speaker: Drunken Dwarf
lines.text: I'm supposhed to sholve this for a bet *hic* but I'm feeling a lil eh. Help me!
